pg.chatbot.meta.title: AI Chatbot | Automation | ProxyToads

pg.chatbot.hero.title: Chatbots that speak like humans, work like machines
pg.chatbot.hero.sub: We build AI conversational assistants that understand natural language and give accurate answers to your customers on any channel, at any hour.

pg.chatbot.ch.sub: We deploy your AI assistant on the channels your customers already use, with no friction or platform changes.

pg.chatbot.ch.2.desc: Chat widget embedded on your website. Captures leads, answers questions and guides visitors toward conversion while you sleep.

pg.chatbot.feat.1.title: Natural language understanding
pg.chatbot.feat.1.desc: Understands questions with typos, variations and context — just like a human would.
pg.chatbot.feat.2.title: Multi-turn conversations

pg.chatbot.feat.3.title: Human handoff

pg.chatbot.feat.5.title: Document-based answers

pg.chatbot.feat.6.title: Conversation analytics

pg.audit.meta.title: Process Audit | Digital Transformation | ProxyToads
pg.audit.meta.desc: Deep diagnosis of your business processes. We identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks and improvement opportunities with detailed analysis and a prioritised digital roadmap.
pg.audit.hero.title: Understand your business before transforming it
pg.audit.hero.sub: We carry out an exhaustive diagnosis of your processes to precisely identify what works, what doesn't and which improvement opportunities offer the greatest return.
pg.audit.stages.title: A complete diagnosis in two phases
pg.audit.stages.sub: Our audit process follows a proven methodology that goes from the general to the specific, ensuring no critical point is left unanalysed.
pg.audit.stages.1.title: Analysis
pg.audit.stages.1.desc: Process mapping, team interviews, bottleneck identification and inefficiency detection. A full diagnosis of your real situation.
pg.audit.stages.2.title: Roadmap
pg.audit.stages.2.desc: A prioritised action plan with concrete initiatives, timelines, estimated budget and tracking KPIs to guide your digital transformation.
pg.audit.del.title: Concrete outputs, not empty presentations
pg.audit.del.1.title: As-Is process maps
pg.audit.del.1.desc: Visual documentation of how your most critical processes currently operate.
pg.audit.del.2.title: Inefficiency report
pg.audit.del.2.desc: Prioritised list of detected problems with estimated impact on time and cost.
pg.audit.del.3.title: Industry benchmarking
pg.audit.del.3.desc: Comparison of your digital maturity against similar companies in your sector.
pg.audit.del.4.title: Automation opportunities
pg.audit.del.4.desc: Specific processes where automation would generate the greatest return.
pg.audit.del.5.title: Digital roadmap
pg.audit.del.5.desc: Phased action plan with priorities, owners and investment estimates.
pg.audit.del.6.title: Presentation session
pg.audit.del.6.desc: Findings and plan presented to your leadership team with time for questions.

pg.ctech.t1.title: Docker containers
pg.ctech.t1.desc: We package your applications into portable containers that behave identically across development, staging and production.

pg.ctech.t5.desc: Istio and Linkerd for traffic management, observability and security between microservices in production.

pg.devops.hero.title: Speed and security — without having to choose

pg.devops.o4.desc: HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager and automatic credential rotation so sensitive keys are never exposed.

pg.devops.o5.desc: Centralised, indexed logs with alerts to detect anomalies and debug issues in seconds.
pg.devops.o6.title: Disaster recovery

pg.devops.sec.title: Proactive protection at every layer of your infrastructure
pg.devops.s1.title: Identity management (IAM)
pg.devops.s1.desc: Least-privilege principle, MFA and role-based access control to protect who accesses what.
pg.devops.s2.title: Vulnerability scanning
pg.devops.s2.desc: Continuous scanning of containers, dependencies and infrastructure to catch vulnerabilities before they are exploited.
pg.devops.s3.title: Encryption at rest & in transit
pg.devops.s3.desc: AES-256, TLS 1.3 and automated certificate management to protect all your data.
pg.devops.s4.title: Compliance & audit
pg.devops.s4.desc: GDPR, ISO 27001, SOC 2 and other standards compliance with complete audit trails.
pg.devops.s5.title: WAF & DDoS protection
pg.devops.s5.desc: Web application firewall and denial-of-service mitigation at network and application level.
pg.devops.s6.title: Pentesting & code review
pg.devops.s6.desc: Periodic penetration tests and security code reviews to find real weaknesses before attackers do.

pg.wa.f6.desc: Logs every conversation, contact and relevant data point in your CRM automatically.
pg.wa.how.title: Live in under two weeks
pg.wa.step.1.title: Onboarding & design
pg.wa.step.1.desc: We gather your conversation flows, FAQs and brand personality.
pg.wa.step.2.title: API integration
pg.wa.step.2.desc: We connect the chatbot to your WhatsApp Business API with your own or a dedicated number.
pg.wa.step.3.title: Training & testing
pg.wa.step.3.desc: We train with your real data and test all flows before going live.
pg.wa.step.4.title: Launch & improvement
pg.wa.step.4.desc: We activate in production and monitor conversations to continuously optimise.
pg.wchat.meta.title: AI Chatbot for Web | ProxyToads
pg.wchat.meta.desc: AI chatbot embedded in your website. Customisable widget, 24/7 support, lead capture, human agent handoff and real-time conversation analytics.
pg.wchat.hero.title: Turn every visit into a conversation
pg.wchat.hero.sub: We embed an AI chatbot into your website that captures leads, answers frequently asked questions and guides visitors toward conversion — without your team needing to be present.
pg.wchat.feat.title: A widget that works for you while you sleep
pg.wchat.feat.sub: Fully customisable with your brand's colours, tone and voice. Your visitors will barely notice it's a bot.
pg.wchat.f1.title: Customisable widget
pg.wchat.f1.desc: Colours, logo, typography and tone of voice adapted to your brand. Discreet or proactive — your choice.
pg.wchat.f2.title: Lead capture
pg.wchat.f2.desc: Collects name, email and phone conversationally — with higher conversion rates than a static form.
pg.wchat.f3.title: Answers from your content
pg.wchat.f3.desc: The chatbot learns from your website, documents and FAQs to respond with accurate, up-to-date information.
pg.wchat.f4.title: Multilingual support
pg.wchat.f4.desc: Detects the visitor's language and responds accordingly. Ideal for companies with an international presence.
pg.wchat.f5.title: Live agent handoff
pg.wchat.f5.desc: When the chatbot can't resolve something, it transfers the visitor to a human agent with full conversation context.
pg.wchat.f6.title: Conversation analytics
pg.wchat.f6.desc: Dashboard with usage metrics, top questions, resolution rate and improvement opportunities detected by AI.
pg.wchat.int.title: Works with your current stack
pg.wchat.int.1.title: One line of code
pg.wchat.int.1.desc: Install with a JavaScript snippet. Compatible with any website or CMS: WordPress, Webflow, Shopify, Astro…
pg.wchat.int.2.title: CRM connection
pg.wchat.int.2.desc: Leads and conversations automatically synced with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive and 50+ CRMs.
pg.wchat.int.3.title: Team notifications
pg.wchat.int.3.desc: Alerts on Slack, Teams or email when a qualified lead needs human follow-up.
pg.analysis.meta.title: Process Analysis | Audit | ProxyToads
pg.analysis.meta.desc: In-depth analysis of your business processes. Flow mapping, team interviews, inefficiency identification and a complete diagnosis to prepare your digital transformation.
pg.analysis.hero.title: A complete X-ray of how your business operates
pg.analysis.hero.sub: We carry out a detailed analysis of every key process to understand where time and money are being lost, which tools are underused and where the best improvement opportunities lie.
pg.analysis.meth.title: How we carry out the analysis
pg.analysis.meth.sub: We combine team interviews, direct process observation and data analysis to build an objective, complete picture.
pg.analysis.step.1.title: Kick-off & scope
pg.analysis.step.1.desc: We define which processes to analyse, who is involved and the concrete objectives of the diagnosis.
pg.analysis.step.2.title: Interviews & observation
pg.analysis.step.2.desc: We talk to the people who execute processes every day to capture reality, not just the manual.
pg.analysis.step.3.title: As-Is mapping
pg.analysis.step.3.desc: We visually document each process with its steps, actors, tools and identified pain points.
pg.analysis.step.4.title: Diagnosis & prioritisation
pg.analysis.step.4.desc: We quantify the impact of each inefficiency and prioritise opportunities by effort and return.
pg.analysis.del.title: What you receive when the analysis is complete
pg.analysis.del.1.title: As-Is process maps
pg.analysis.del.1.desc: Detailed diagrams of each analysed process with actors, tools, steps and friction points.
pg.analysis.del.2.title: Inefficiency report
pg.analysis.del.2.desc: Quantified list of issues: time lost, frequent errors, duplications and low-value tasks.
pg.analysis.del.3.title: Tool analysis
pg.analysis.del.3.desc: Assessment of what tools you use, which are redundant, which are missing and which integrations would improve the operation.
pg.analysis.del.4.title: Executive summary
pg.analysis.del.4.desc: Presentation of the most important findings for your leadership team in clear language focused on business impact.
pg.roadmap.meta.title: Digital Roadmap | Audit | ProxyToads
pg.roadmap.meta.desc: Digital transformation roadmap creation. Prioritised action plan with concrete initiatives, timelines, estimated budget and KPIs to guide your digitalisation.
pg.roadmap.hero.title: The clear path to your digital transformation
pg.roadmap.hero.sub: We turn the findings from the analysis into a concrete, prioritised action plan with clear indicators so you know exactly what to do, when and with what budget.
pg.roadmap.inc.title: A transformation plan ready to execute
pg.roadmap.inc.sub: This is not a generic presentation. It's a plan specific to your business, with initiatives prioritised by impact and ordered in time.
pg.roadmap.i1.title: Prioritised initiatives
pg.roadmap.i1.desc: Actions ordered by business impact and ease of implementation, with a justification for each decision.
pg.roadmap.i2.title: Phases & timelines
pg.roadmap.i2.desc: Phased plan with estimated duration for each initiative and dependencies clearly marked.
pg.roadmap.i3.title: Estimated budget
pg.roadmap.i3.desc: Approximate cost for each initiative: tools, development, training and implementation broken down.
pg.roadmap.i4.title: Tracking KPIs
pg.roadmap.i4.desc: Specific indicators to measure the success of each initiative and overall transformation progress.
pg.roadmap.i5.title: Quick wins identified
pg.roadmap.i5.desc: Fast improvements that can be implemented in weeks with high impact and minimal effort to build momentum.
pg.roadmap.i6.title: Change management
pg.roadmap.i6.desc: Recommendations to ensure your team successfully adopts the changes without internal resistance.
pg.roadmap.phases.1.title: Short term (0–3 months)
pg.roadmap.phases.1.desc: Quick wins and immediate improvements: collaboration tools, document digitalisation and first automations.
pg.roadmap.phases.2.title: Medium term (3–9 months)
pg.roadmap.phases.2.desc: Medium-impact projects: CRM, key integrations, main process automation and team training.
pg.roadmap.phases.3.title: Long term (9–18 months)
pg.roadmap.phases.3.desc: Deep transformations: new platforms, digital business models and advanced AI capabilities.
pg.aws.meta.title: Amazon Web Services (AWS) | ProxyToads
pg.aws.meta.desc: Specialised AWS services: Well-Architected design, cloud migration, cost optimisation and ongoing infrastructure management on Amazon Web Services.
pg.aws.hero.title: AWS experts for your cloud infrastructure
pg.aws.hero.sub: We design, migrate and optimise your infrastructure on Amazon Web Services with proven architectures, first-class security and costs under control from day one.
pg.aws.svc.title: The AWS services that generate the most impact for your business
pg.aws.svc.sub: We work across the entire AWS ecosystem, but specialise in the services that deliver the most value to growing companies.
pg.aws.s1.title: EC2 & Auto Scaling
pg.aws.s1.desc: Virtual servers with automatic scaling to handle any load without over-provisioning or running out of resources.
pg.aws.s2.title: S3 & storage
pg.aws.s2.desc: Infinitely scalable, cost-effective object storage with 99.999999999% durability.
pg.aws.s3.title: Lambda & Serverless
pg.aws.s3.desc: Code that runs without managing servers. Pay only per actual execution, scales to zero when idle.
pg.aws.s4.title: RDS & Aurora
pg.aws.s4.desc: Managed relational databases with automatic backups, high availability and optimised performance.
pg.aws.s5.title: EKS & containers
pg.aws.s5.desc: AWS-managed Kubernetes to orchestrate Docker containers in production with fewer operational overheads.
pg.aws.s6.title: VPC & networking
pg.aws.s6.desc: Isolated virtual private networks with full control over routing, subnets and perimeter security.
pg.aws.how.title: How we help you with AWS
pg.aws.h1.title: AWS Well-Architected design
pg.aws.h1.desc: Architectures that meet the 6 pillars of the AWS framework: operations, security, reliability, performance, cost and sustainability.
pg.aws.h2.title: Migration from on-premise or between clouds
pg.aws.h2.desc: Planned migration with lift-and-shift, re-platforming or re-architecting strategy depending on your case.
pg.aws.h3.title: Cost optimisation
pg.aws.h3.desc: AWS account audit, instance right-sizing, Savings Plans and elimination of forgotten resources.
pg.aws.h4.title: Management & operations
pg.aws.h4.desc: Monitoring, alerts, incident management and continuous infrastructure updates so you can forget about servers.
pg.azure.meta.title: Azure & Google Cloud Platform | ProxyToads
pg.azure.meta.desc: Migration and management on Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud Platform. Multi-cloud strategy, solution architecture and optimisation for businesses that want provider flexibility.
pg.azure.hero.title: Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud at your company's service
pg.azure.hero.sub: We help you get the best out of Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud Platform with multi-cloud strategies, robust architectures and continuous management.
pg.azure.az.title: Microsoft's cloud for enterprise environments
pg.azure.az.sub: The natural choice for businesses already living in the Microsoft ecosystem. Native integration with Office 365, Active Directory and the full enterprise productivity stack.
pg.azure.az.1.title: Azure Active Directory
pg.azure.az.1.desc: Identity and access management integrated with your corporate Active Directory.
pg.azure.az.2.title: Azure DevOps
pg.azure.az.2.desc: CI/CD pipelines, repos and project management in a native Microsoft environment.
pg.azure.az.3.title: Azure OpenAI Service
pg.azure.az.3.desc: Access to GPT-4 and other LLMs directly within your Azure infrastructure.
pg.azure.az.4.title: Azure Kubernetes Service
pg.azure.az.4.desc: Managed Kubernetes with deep integration across the Microsoft ecosystem.
pg.azure.gcp.title: The infrastructure that powers Google, for your business
pg.azure.gcp.sub: The world's best network infrastructure and the most advanced AI and analytics tools on the market. Ideal for companies with large data volumes or machine learning needs.
pg.azure.gcp.1.title: BigQuery
pg.azure.gcp.1.desc: Serverless data warehouse to analyse terabytes of data in seconds at minimal cost.
pg.azure.gcp.2.title: Vertex AI
pg.azure.gcp.2.desc: Unified platform for training, deploying and managing machine learning models.
pg.azure.gcp.3.title: GKE (Google Kubernetes Engine)
pg.azure.gcp.3.desc: Kubernetes where it was born: the most mature and complete container orchestration environment.
pg.azure.gcp.4.title: Cloud Run
pg.azure.gcp.4.desc: Serverless containers that scale to zero automatically. No cluster management needed.
pg.azure.multi.title: When to use each provider
pg.azure.multi.1.title: Choose AWS if…
pg.azure.multi.1.desc: You need the widest ecosystem of services, the largest community and the undisputed cloud market leader.
pg.azure.multi.2.title: Choose Azure if…
pg.azure.multi.2.desc: You already use Microsoft 365, Active Directory or Microsoft products and want native integration without friction.
pg.azure.multi.3.title: Choose GCP if…
pg.azure.multi.3.desc: Your business works with large data volumes, machine learning or you want the best global network infrastructure.
